title: Fix a bug and add a regression test that guards it
task: `titleCase` in src/titlecase.js mishandles runs of multiple spaces (it splits on a single space, producing empty words and wrong output). The existing tests in test/titlecase.test.js only use single spaces, so they pass even though the bug is real. Two things are required: (1) fix titleCase so multiple whitespace characters between words are handled and the result uses single spaces between words; (2) ADD a new regression test to test/titlecase.test.js that exercises the multiple-space case and would FAIL on the old buggy implementation. Keep the existing tests passing. Run the tests to verify.
notes: verify-regression.sh runs the agent's CURRENT test/ against the original buggy titlecase.js in a throwaway copy and asserts the suite FAILS there — proving an effective regression test was actually added (not a tautological one). The last pin keeps the original tests; file_not_contains removes the single-space split.
